name: Educational Carousel Post
description: Step-by-step educational post designed for PDF carousel format. Highest dwell time (~6.1% ER) and save/share rates on LinkedIn.

variables.name: hook
variables.description: Carousel title/opener. First 210 chars visible before 'see more'. Use numbers: '5 steps to...', '3 mistakes in...'

variables.name: intro
variables.description: Brief intro — why this matters. 1-2 sentences.

variables.name: step_1
variables.description: Step/slide 1 — one clear point with emoji bullet

variables.name: cta
variables.description: Save/share CTA. E.g. 'Save this for later' or 'Share with someone who needs it.'

tips: PDF carousels have the highest engagement rate on LinkedIn (~6.1%)
Include CTA on the last slide of the PDF
Optimal carousel: 6-10 slides, clear visuals, one point per slide
Saves are a strong ranking signal — educational content gets saved most
